response.note: Failed to load response data — Request with the provided ID has already finished loading

ui_result.error_message: I'm sorry but there was an error. Please try again.
ui_result.note: Generic error shown, NOT APF warning text

console_errors: Matched leaf route at location '/copilot/c/...' does not have an element or Component (React routing warning, not APF-related)

diagnosis.observation: Build #21 intended to return 422 + JSON error body, but actual status was 200 OK. EventStream shows 0 events — SSE stream was received but no events parsed. Response data could not be loaded (already finished). UI shows generic Copilot error, not APF warning text.
possible_causes: Build #21 may not have been deployed to the test server yet
422 status code may have been converted back to 200 by Etap proxy
SSE content-type header may still be set, causing 200 status with empty SSE body
diagnosis.conclusion: The 422 JSON error approach was NOT observed. Status was 200 with 0 EventStream events. UI showed generic error, not APF-specific warning. Need to verify Build #21 deployment status on Etap server.
